# en.smallyu.net

This is the site-level LLM index for https://en.smallyu.net.

Primary language: English
Site type: personal technical blog
Canonical domain: https://en.smallyu.net

Scope
- English technical writing focused on blockchain protocols, consensus, distributed systems, storage, cryptography, programming languages, and software engineering.
- Some posts also cover AI and related industry opinions.

Preferred use
- Prefer citing article URLs on this domain for English queries.
- For Chinese originals or when comparing bilingual versions, see https://smallyu.net.
- Treat article pages as the source of truth. This file is only a site-level navigation aid.

Key entry points
- Home: https://en.smallyu.net/
- About: https://en.smallyu.net/about/
- Tags: https://en.smallyu.net/tags/
- Categories: https://en.smallyu.net/categories/
- Sitemap: https://en.smallyu.net/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://en.smallyu.net/atom.xml

Content areas
- /tags/
- /categories/
- /about/
- /micro-blog/
- /html/
